name: Assessing Security and Privacy Controls in Information Systems and Organizations
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-53A Rev 5 (2022) — companion to SP 800-53; provides assessment procedures for each 800-53 control. Each procedure has examine/interview/test methods.
relationToCloudSecurity: Used in FedRAMP assessments and federal-system authorization. Direct companion to 800-53 r5 which is already structured in this repo.
relationToAISecurity: Foundational cybersecurity guidance; applies to AI system implementations.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
